questions.question_text: In the reaction MnO4^- + SO3^2- + H+ ⟶ SO4^2- + Mn^2+ + H2O
options: MnO4^- and H+ both are reduced
MnO4^- is reduced and H+ is oxidised
MnO4^- is reduced and SO3^2- is oxidised
MnO4^- is oxidised and SO3^2- is reduced

5 x equivalent weight and 3 x equivalent weight
